genre_refs: American West / Monument Valley landscape iconography
description: DHS slogan graphic using a photograph of a Southwestern desert landscape: red-rock mesas, buttes, and spires under a pastel pink and lavender sky, with sandy desert plains stretching to the horizon. Centered in the upper-middle of the image, in a large white serif slab typeface stacked on two lines, is the text 'Worth Fighting For.' There is no visible agency seal on the image itself. The tweet text reads: 'God has blessed us to call the greatest nation in history home. We must fight for America.'
